title: Iron deficiency follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports clinician review of iron indices, anaemia, GI symptoms, bleeding, diet, medicines, blood donation, surgery, family history, and comorbidity.
red_flags.rationale: Relevant to clinician review of iron indices, anaemia, symptoms, bleeding, diet, medicines, donation, surgery, family history and comorbidity without confirming cause.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports clinician review of iron indices, anaemia, GI symptoms, bleeding, diet, medicines, blood donation, surgery, family history, and comorbidity.

investigations.text: Supports recording completed coeliac testing, endoscopy, imaging, response, recurrence, and clinician-decided follow-up without ordering tests.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Actual haemoglobin, ferritin, iron indices, bleeding, diet, menstruation, cause, investigation, treatment response and follow-up interval are absent.
No cause, diagnosis, test, treatment, endoscopy or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
